MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-14-540223 WITH CASE CGC-14-539944
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS VICTORINO IGNACIO, ALICIA IGNACIO, RODRIGO ALIBAYAN, AND MARIA ALIBAYAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CGC-14-540223 WITH CASE CGC-14-539944 is granted. No opposition filed.
